name: Spiced Chicken BBQ
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat cooking oil in a saucepan and cook onion and garlic until tender, but do not brown.
2. Add ketchup and stir.
3. Add remaining ingredients (except chicken) to the saucepan.
4. Bring to a boil and reduce heat. Simmer, uncovered, for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Set sauce aside to cool slightly.
6. Season chicken pieces with additional salt, if desired.
7. Place chicken pieces bone side down over medium to hot coals.
8. Grill for 25 minutes (until the bone side is well browned).
9. Turn pieces over and grill an additional 25 minutes or until chicken is tender.
10. Brush chicken frequently with sauce during the last 10 minutes of grilling, using all the sauce.
